metadata.description: Niruta Talwekar's Claude Code plugins — currently hosts `evalit`, a reviewer-assist academic-paper review pipeline.

plugins.name: evalit
plugins.description: Reviewer-assist academic-paper review — 5-stage pipeline (compliance, citation verification, depth, rubric, composite) with NeurIPS/IEEE/arXiv configs. Outputs structured signals for a human reviewer, never an accept/reject decision.
